title: ほんの少しのキッカケ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, Tosen Jordan passes me her
phone to show me a picture of a hot spring inn.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Isn't this place awesome? I wanna go sometime!
And by sometime, I mean let's go already!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You can eat at the restaurant without even
staying there, and it looks totally fire! C'mon,
let's just go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The inn seems pretty far away. I tell her we should
go when we have more free time, but...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
We'll be there super fast if we take the train.
Besides, the rule is that when you wanna go
somewhere, you should go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a long train ride, we arrive at the inn and
are greeted by one of the staff. We tell her we're
just here for food...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Really? You'll even prepare fish that we catch and
bring in ourselves?!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's one of the special services we offer.
We prepare and serve the fish right in front of
you. Are you interested?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Am I?! Wow! Yeah, let's gooo!
choice_data_list: But we don't have much time today...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What? You mean you wanna come all the way out here and not do it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta follow the good eats! There's, like,
literally no other choice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Tosen Jordan's insistence, we head to the
nearby coast to do some fishing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No way! You got another one?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
How come you're the only one who can catch
any?!
choice_data_list: Let's head back since we've got some.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What? We can't go back yet. I can't let it end like
this!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to lose... I just need to cast closer to
the deep part!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, as if I don't know tha—gyah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: SPLASH!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry... I knocked you into the water.
choice_data_list: I'm just a little wet. It's fine.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No, it's not fine. This isn't good. We have to dry you off quick before you catch a cold!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I borrowed a robe, some towels, and a
dryer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan silently dries my hair with the towel
and hair dryer.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Is it too hot?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right... So, uh, the hotel person said they'd
get the hot spring ready. Why don't you go take a
dip?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'll just... do whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's playing it calm, but I can tell she's actually
upset. What should I say to her?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's playing it calm, but I can tell she's actually
upset. What should I say to her?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You should be angry with me! I've totally been
dragging you around.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I stuffed my face, forced you here, made you
exhausted... made you protect me, and knocked
you into the water...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No matter how you swing it, it's not cool.
choice_data_list: I'm just happy you were happy.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And me being happy is exactly what caused you
so much trouble! That's how you ended up in the
ocean!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Are you stupid or something? Seriously...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Despite what she says, Tosen Jordan looks happy.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Of course I am. I mean, look at what happened.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
When something like this happens, all I can think
to do is write out an apology... Should I?
choice_data_list:
No need for that. Just try not to catch a cold,
okay?

No need for that. Just try not to catch a cold,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Are you still worrying about me? What is up with you?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, seriously... Talk about being a
goody-goody.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan doesn't talk much after that, as if
she's mulling something over.
